channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Billboard’s Music Industry Events Calendar
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to our podcast, where we bring you the latest updates from the music industry. Today, we're talking about a new feature on Billboard Pro that's going to make it easier for you to stay on top of all the major music industry events.
[Short music transition]
Host: "Billboard Pro has just launched a music industry events calendar, covering everything from conferences to festivals, and even networking mixers. This calendar is set to become the ultimate guide to what's happening in the music industry, both nationally and internationally.
[Short pause]
Host: "We've taken a sneak peek at the calendar, and it's already filling up with exciting events. For example, the globalFEST winter festival is happening on January 17th, 2027, in New York. And that's just the beginning - the calendar stretches all the way from April 2026 to March 2028.
[Short music transition]
Host: "If you're an event organizer, you can get your event listed on the calendar by reaching out to joe.maimone@billboard.com. That's all for today - thanks for tuning in, and don't forget to check out the new events calendar on Billboard Pro for all the latest music industry happenings."
[Outro music plays]
